item.title: 大疆影石专利战火烧回国内，双方互相起诉多项核心专利侵权
item.guid: 大疆影石专利战火烧回国内，双方互相起诉多项核心专利侵权
item.description:
According to Yicai, DJI has filed patent infringement lawsuits against Insta360's Luna series in people's courts across multiple locations in China. Among them, a case accepted by the Shenzhen Intermediate People's Court in Guangdong Province will be heard on August 3. 据第一财经报道，大疆已在中国多地人民法院对影石 Luna 系列提起专利侵权诉讼。其中，广东省深圳市中级人民法院受理的案件将于 8 月 3 日开庭。

In the relevant lawsuits, DJI alleges that Insta360's Luna series infringes upon several of its invention patents, involving handheld gimbals and their control methods, shooting methods and storage media based on handheld gimbals, detachable control devices, gimbal devices, and their control solutions, among others. 大疆在相关诉讼中指控影石 Luna 系列涉嫌侵犯其多项发明专利，涉及手持云台及其控制方法、基于手持云台的拍摄方法和存储介质、可拆卸控制装置、云台装置及其控制方案等。

Insta360 subsequently responded yesterday and filed 6 patent infringement counter-lawsuits against DJI in multiple Chinese cities. 影石随后在昨日对此作出回应，并在中国多个城市对大疆提起 6 起专利侵权反诉。

Insta360 accuses DJI's main products, such as panoramic cameras and gimbal equipment, of infringing upon several of its patents. The technologies involved include panoramic shooting and editing, bullet-time shooting, camera thermal management solutions, camera expansion solutions, and gimbal support technology. On the same day, Insta360 also submitted requests to the China National Intellectual Property Administration for invalidation of DJI's relevant patents. 影石指控大疆的全景相机及云台设备等主力产品侵犯其多项专利，涉及技术包括全景拍摄与剪辑、子弹时间拍摄、相机热管理方案、相机扩展方案以及云台支撑技术等。同日，影石还向中国国家知识产权局提交了针对大疆相关专利的无效宣告请求。

This domestic lawsuit emerged after the withdrawal of both parties' US cases. On June 28, US local time, both DJI and Insta360 submitted withdrawal applications to the U.S. District Court for the Eastern District of Texas, withdrawing their previously filed patent infringement lawsuits and related counter-lawsuits, respectively. 这起国内诉讼出现在双方美国案件撤回之后。美国当地时间 6 月 28 日，大疆与影石均向美国德克萨斯州东区联邦地区法院提交撤案申请，分别撤回此前提起的专利侵权诉讼及相关反诉。

item.title: 存在植入后门风险，阿里内部全面禁用 Claude Code
item.guid: 存在植入后门风险，阿里内部全面禁用-Claude-Code
item.description:
On July 3, iFanr learned from Alibaba insiders that due to recent reports of security risks involving backdoors in Claude Code, Alibaba has listed it as high-risk software after a comprehensive evaluation. 7 月 3 日，爱范儿从阿里内部人士处获悉，因近期 Claude Code 被曝存在植入后门的安全风险，阿里经综合评估后已将其列入高风险软件名单。

Starting from July 10, Alibaba will completely prohibit internal employees from using Claude Code in the office environment and recommend Qoder as an alternative. 自 7 月 10 日起，阿里将全面禁止内部员工在办公环境下使用 Claude Code，并推荐使用 Qoder 作为替代方案。

item.title: 曝腾讯 QClaw 负责人张舒昱离职，否认内部存在「赛马」机制
item.guid: 曝腾讯-QClaw-负责人张舒昱离职，否认内部存在「赛马」机制
item.description:
According to a report by Yicai, Zhang Shuyu, head of Tencent QClaw and product manager, officially resigned from Tencent on June 29. 据第一财经报道，腾讯 QClaw 负责人、产品经理张舒昱已于 6 月 29 日从腾讯正式离职。

Yesterday, Zhang Shuyu posted a long article on social media confirming the news and reviewing her journey of leading the C-side product QClaw from 0 to 1. Regarding the long-standing rumors of internal "horse racing" within Tencent, Zhang Shuyu explicitly clarified in the article, stating that "there has never been any horse racing internally." 张舒昱昨日在社交平台发布长文确认了这一消息，并回顾了其主导 C 端产品 QClaw 从 0 到 1 的历程。针对外界长期存在的腾讯内部「赛马」传闻，张舒昱在文中明确澄清，称「内部从来没有什么赛马」。

She disclosed that QClaw and another product, WorkBuddy, report to the same person in charge, and their growth team members highly overlap in some stages, with different product lines having their own missions within the organization. 她披露，QClaw 与另一款产品 WorkBuddy 汇报给同一位负责人，且在部分阶段的增长团队成员高度重合，不同产品路线在组织内部各有使命。

Zhang Shuyu mentioned in the article that she achieved the goal of earning a million yuan annually at the age of 25 and realized her career plan of creating a "phenomenal product" at 26. For the future, she expressed hope to solve one or more problems that plague humanity. 张舒昱在文中提到，其 25 岁时达成了年入百万的目标，26 岁时实现了做出「现象级产品」的职业规划。对于未来，她表示希望能够解决一个或多个困扰人类的难题。

item.title: 每周最高 200 美元，特斯拉开始控制员工 AI 算力成本
item.guid: 每周最高-200-美元，特斯拉开始控制员工-AI-算力成本
item.description:
According to The Information, Tesla began implementing spending limits on employees' AI expenses yesterday. An internal memo shows that starting July 6, Tesla employees' weekly AI spending limit has been set at $200 per person. 据 The Information 报道，特斯拉于昨日起对员工的 AI 开支实施限额管理。一份内部备忘录显示，从 7 月 6 日开始，特斯拉员工每人每周的 AI 支出上限被设定在 200 美元。

The report points out that before the implementation of these limits, Tesla experienced a period of surging AI usage internally. In recent months, some software engineers consumed tokens worth thousands of dollars each week. 报道指出，此次限额措施出台前，特斯拉内部经历了一段 AI 使用量激增的时期。在过去几个月中，部分软件工程师每周消耗的 Token 价值高达数千美元。

According to the new regulations, employees who need to exceed the weekly $200 limit must obtain approval from their superiors. However, according to informed sources, this statistic does not include test versions of xAI products. 根据新规定，员工若需超过每周 200 美元的限额，必须获得上级批准。不过，据知情人士透露，该统计不包括 xAI 产品的测试版本。

item.title: 理想汽车调整组织架构，产品定义职能回归研发部门
item.guid: 理想汽车调整组织架构，产品定义职能回归研发部门
item.description:
According to a report by "National Business Daily," Li Auto recently carried out a new round of organizational restructuring, planning to split some key functions of the product department and integrate them into the R&D department. The core of this adjustment is to "return product definition to R&D," aiming to optimize the product decision-making process and shorten the cycle from definition to implementation. 据《每日经济新闻》报道，理想汽车近期对组织架构进行了新一轮调整，计划将产品部的部分关键职能拆分并整合至研发部门。此次调整的核心在于让「产品定义回归研发」，旨在优化产品决策流程，缩短从定义到落地的周期。

Insiders revealed that this change primarily involves two core product definition teams: electric vehicle body and autonomous driving. 知情人士透露，此次变动主要涉及电动本体和自动驾驶两大核心产品定义团队。

    Specifically, the product department's electric vehicle body definition team has been merged into the vehicle R&D department, which is led by Liu Liguo, Senior Vice President of Vehicle Electric R&D

    The autonomous driving terminal product team has been merged into the base model R&D team, led by Zhan Kun, head of base models.

After the adjustment, Li Auto's decision-making departments will be reduced from three to two, namely the product line and R&D department, with the intermediate platform product definition stage being omitted. By connecting product definition and R&D, the company hopes to ensure the feasibility of technical solutions and establish a two-way communication and feedback mechanism to enhance the product definition's dynamic adaptability to market changes. 调整完成后，理想汽车的决策部门将由三个缩减为两个，即产品线和研发部门，中间的平台产品定义环节将被省略。通过打通产品定义与研发之间的衔接，公司希望确保技术方案的可行性，并建立双向沟通反馈机制，以提升产品定义对市场变化的动态适应能力。

item.title: 阿里整合三大 AI 智能体产品，92 年钉钉 CEO 陈宇森统领
item.guid: 阿里整合三大-AI-智能体产品，92-年钉钉-CEO-陈宇森统领
item.description:
Alibaba confirmed yesterday that it is strategically integrating three of its enterprise-grade AI agent products. This adjustment is based on the desktop AI agent tool QoderWork, deeply integrating the core capabilities of "Wukong," an enterprise collaborative office AI platform incubated by DingTalk, and MuleRun, an AI execution engine internally incubated by Alibaba Cloud. 阿里巴巴昨日确认，正对其旗下三款企业级 AI 智能体产品进行战略整合。此次调整以桌面 AI 智能体工具 QoderWork 为基础，深度融合钉钉孵化的企业协同办公 AI 平台「悟空」以及阿里云内部创业的 AI 执行引擎 MuleRun 的核心能力。

The integrated new AI product will target enterprise productivity scenarios and will be fully overseen by Chen Yusen, a "post-90s" executive who just took over as CEO of the Wukong Business Unit and CEO of DingTalk in mid-June this year. 整合后的全新 AI 产品将面向企业生产力场景，由今年 6 月中旬刚刚接任悟空事业部 CEO 兼钉钉 CEO 的「90后」陈宇森全面负责。

36Kr reported that Alibaba's move aims to end internal "horse racing" and concentrate resources to address competitive pressure from ByteDance's "Kouzi" and Feishu Agent, Tencent WorkBuddy, and other peers. 36 氪报道称，阿里此举旨在结束内部赛马，集中资源应对来自字节跳动「扣子」及飞书 Agent、腾讯 WorkBuddy 等同行的竞争压力。

In the future, Chen Yusen may adopt a layered integration architecture for the three products: QoderWork will provide front-end capabilities for desktop interaction and local execution, MuleRun will be responsible for the mid-end engine for Agent self-evolution and process reuse, and Wukong will serve as the back-end foundation, providing DingTalk's enterprise data, collaborative relationships, and organizational structure support. 未来，陈宇森或将对三款产品采取能力分层融合的架构：由 QoderWork 提供桌面交互与本地执行的前台能力，MuleRun 负责 Agent 自进化与流程复用的中台引擎，而悟空则作为后台底座，提供钉钉的企业数据、协同关系及组织架构支持。

Currently, Alibaba officially responded that the existing product services of QoderWork, Wukong, and MuleRun will achieve seamless upgrades in the future, and all user rights will not be affected. 目前，阿里官方已对此回应称，QoderWork、悟空、MuleRun 的现有产品服务未来将实现无缝升级，所有用户权益不会受到影响。

item.title: 曝三星拿下 Meta 10 万亿韩元巨额芯片订单
item.guid: 曝三星拿下-Meta-10-万亿韩元巨额芯片订单
item.description:
According to "The Chosun Ilbo," Samsung Electronics' foundry division (Samsung Foundry) has recently entered an "allocation" phase for some advanced processes due to a surge in AI chip demand. This means Samsung has begun to adjust supply priorities, ensuring existing major customer orders first, and screening orders from new customers. 据《朝鲜日报》报道，三星电子晶圆代工部门（Samsung Foundry）近期因 AI 芯片需求激增，已针对部分先进制程进入「分配（Allocation）」阶段。这意味着三星开始调整供应优先级，优先保障现有大客户订单，并对新客户的订单进行筛选。

The report disclosed that Meta has decided to entrust Samsung with the foundry production of its third-generation self-developed AI accelerator "MTIA," with the contract value estimated to exceed 10 trillion Korean Won (approximately 7.3 billion USD). The chip is planned for mass production using Samsung's cutting-edge 2-nanometer process, with an order volume of hundreds of thousands of units. 报道披露，Meta 已决定将其第三代自研 AI 加速器「MTIA」交由三星代工，合同价值预计超过 10 万亿韩元（约合 73 亿美元）。该芯片计划采用三星 2 纳米尖端工艺量产，订单量达数十万组。

Additionally, Anthropic is also evaluating the use of Samsung's 2nm process to develop custom chips, in order to reduce reliance on Nvidia GPUs. 此外，Anthropic 也在评估利用三星 2 纳米工艺开发定制芯片，以降低对英伟达 GPU 的依赖。

Currently, Samsung's 4nm process capacity for next year is almost sold out, and some 8nm processes are also operating at full capacity. Due to nearing saturation, Samsung's order-taking strategy has shifted from 'multi-variety small-batch' to a more production-efficient and profitable 'few-variety large-batch' model, focusing on core projects from large technology companies. 目前，三星 4 纳米工艺明年的产能已基本售罄，部分 8 纳米工艺也处于满负荷运转状态。由于产能趋于饱和，三星的接单策略已从「多品种小批量」转向更具生产效率和盈利能力的「少品种大批量」模式，重点对接大型科技公司的核心项目。

item.title: 💡 软件工程传奇 Kent Beck：AI 时代程序员更需要学会「做人」
item.guid: 💡-软件工程传奇-Kent-Beck：AI-时代程序员更需要学会「做人」
item.description:
According to Business Insider, Kent Beck, a legendary figure in software engineering, stated yesterday on 'The Pragmatic Engineer' show that with the popularization of AI technology, software engineers must learn 'soft skills' such as communication and empathy to survive in the industry. 据《商业内幕》报道，软件工程领域的传奇人物 Kent Beck 昨日在「The Pragmatic Engineer」节目中表示，随着 AI 技术的普及，软件工程师必须学习沟通与共情等「软技能」以在行业中生存。

Kent Beck pointed out that software engineers often lack good emotional regulation and empathy, and their communication style can sometimes be too direct. He believes that in an era where AI can automatically generate a large amount of code, this traditional 'lone wolf' work model is coming to an end. Kent Beck 指出，软件工程师往往缺乏良好的情绪调节能力和共情心，表达方式有时过于直接。他认为在 AI 能够自动生成大量代码的当下，这种传统的「孤狼式」工作模式即将终结。

Currently, 'Vibe-Coding' practices are becoming popular in the software industry, allowing senior developers to build prototypes more quickly and enabling non-programmers to turn ideas into pilot projects. This trend is blurring the lines between engineering and product work. 目前，软件行业已开始流行「Vibe-Coding」实践，这使得资深开发者能更快速地构建原型，也让非编程人员能够将创意转化为试点项目。这种趋势正在模糊工程与产品工作之间的界限。

To address this change, companies like Anthropic have asked engineers to act as 'Mini Product Managers (Mini PMs)' in small projects, not only responsible for code but also for stakeholder coordination and cross-functional collaboration. Kent Beck described this transformation of professional skills as a 'cosmic prank'. 为了应对这一变化，Anthropic 等公司已要求工程师在小型项目中担任「微型产品经理（Mini PM）」，不仅负责代码，还要承担利益相关者协调和跨职能协作的职责。Kent Beck 将这种职业技能的转型形容为一种「宇宙级的恶作剧」。

When you first started learning to program, people told you that mastering everything about computers would be enough. But then you'll find that your ability to change the world is actually limited by your communication and empathy skills.

The rise of this 'product engineer' role indicates that the most valuable engineers in the future will be those who can combine technical prowess with product judgment and interpersonal skills. 这种「产品工程师」角色的兴起表明，未来最有价值的工程师将是那些能够将技术实力与产品判断力、人际交往能力相结合的人才。

item.title: Google Gemini Omni Flash 登顶视频盲测榜，超越 Seedance-2.0
item.description:
Yesterday, Video Arena ranking data showed that Google DeepMind's Gemini Omni Flash text-to-video model currently ranks first in the text-to-video arena with an Elo score of 1527. 昨天，Video Arena 排名数据显示，Google DeepMind 旗下的 Gemini Omni Flash 文生视频模型目前以 1527 Elo 的成绩位列文生视频竞技场榜首。

In the latest rankings, Google's Gemini Omni Flash demonstrated a significant lead, with its Elo score surpassing ByteDance's dreamina-seedance-2.0-720p (1466 Elo) by 61 points, which ranked second. Alibaba's happyhorse-1.0 secured third place with an Elo score of 1437. 在最新的排名中，Google 的 Gemini Omni Flash 展现出显著的领先优势，其 Elo 分数超出排名第二的字节跳动 dreamina-seedance-2.0-720p（1466 Elo）达 61 分。阿里巴巴旗下的 happyhorse-1.0 则以 1437 Elo 的成绩位居第三。

The overall leaderboard shows a three-way competition between Google, ByteDance, and Alibaba. Among the top ten, Google secured five spots, with its Veo 3.1 series models of different specifications (including 1080p version, audio-enhanced version, and fast version) performing steadily, with Elo scores concentrated between 1362 and 1369. 整体榜单呈现出 Google、字节跳动与阿里巴巴三强争霸的格局。在前十名中，Google 占据了五个席位，其 Veo 3.1 系列的不同规格模型（包括 1080p 版、音频增强版及快速版）表现稳健，Elo 分数集中在 1362 至 1369 之间。

ByteDance's Seedance series models had long maintained a leading position, and the 2.0 version currently remains firmly in the second tier. 字节跳动旗下的 Seedance 系列模型此前长期保持领先，目前 2.0 版本依然稳居第二梯队。

item.title: 三星 Galaxy Glasses 渲染图曝光：对标 Meta，采用常规眼镜造型
item.guid: 三星-Galaxy-Glasses-渲染图曝光：对标-Meta，采用常规眼镜造型
item.description:
According to SamMobile, Samsung is expected to release its first smart glasses product, Galaxy Glasses, by the end of this year. Renderings and videos show that the product adopts a traditional design similar to ordinary black-framed glasses, highly resembling Meta's Ray-Ban smart glasses. 据 SamMobile 报道，三星预计将于今年年底前发布首款智能眼镜产品 Galaxy Glasses。渲染图及视频显示，该产品在设计上采用了类似普通黑框眼镜的传统造型，与 Meta 的 Ray-Ban 智能眼镜高度相似。

In terms of interaction, the top of the right temple of the glasses features a power button, and the volume buttons are located at the rear of the temple. Additionally, the right temple supports touch operations, allowing users to navigate the interface by swiping with one or two fingers. 交互方面，眼镜右侧镜腿顶部设有电源键，音量键位于镜腿后部。此外，右镜腿还支持触控操作，用户可以通过单指或双指滑动来导航界面。

On the software front, Galaxy Glasses will feature the One UI XR system based on Android XR, with deep integration of Google's Gemini AI agent. 软件层面，Galaxy Glasses 将搭载基于 Android XR 的 One UI XR 系统，并深度集成 Google 的 Gemini AI 智能体。

Functionally, the product supports taking photos, recording videos, real-time translation, music playback, and voice navigation. In terms of hardware configuration, the glasses have a built-in 12MP camera, microphone, and speakers, but are not equipped with an internal display. 功能上，该产品支持拍摄照片、录制视频、实时翻译、音乐播放及语音导航。硬件配置方面，眼镜内置了 12MP 摄像头、麦克风和扬声器，但并未配备内置显示屏。

Leaked software interface screenshots also show that Galaxy Glasses can be controlled in conjunction with a Galaxy Ring or Galaxy Watch. To maintain lightweight wear, most data processing will be handled by a connected smartphone. Additionally, the glasses are equipped with photochromic lenses that automatically adjust their tint based on ambient light conditions. 曝光的相关软件界面截图还显示，Galaxy Glasses 能够与 Galaxy Ring 或 Galaxy Watch 联动控制。为了保持佩戴的轻便性，大部分数据处理工作将由连接的手机完成。此外，该眼镜还配备了光致变色镜片，可根据光线环境自动调节深度。

item.title: 生数科技发布 Vidu S1 实时交互模型
item.guid: 生数科技发布-Vidu-S1-实时交互模型
item.description:
Shengshu Technology officially released its new generation real-time interactive model, Vidu S1, yesterday at the 2026 Global Digital Economy Conference. According to reports, this model focuses on real-time interactive video generation capabilities, pushing AI video from offline generation to a continuous interaction stage. 生数科技昨日在 2026 全球数字经济大会上正式发布新一代实时交互模型 Vidu S1。据介绍，该模型主打实时可交互的视频生成能力，推动 AI 视频从离线生成迈向持续互动阶段。

Official information indicates that Vidu S1 supports real-time video calls and voice-controlled video progression. Users can use voice commands to control the behavior, expressions, and full-body movements of digital humans in real-time, enabling continuous interaction of unlimited duration. 官方信息显示，Vidu S1 支持实时视频通话和语音控制视频走向。用户可以通过语音指令实时控制数字人的行为、表情及全身动作，实现无限时长的连续互动。

In terms of technical parameters, Vidu S1 supports 540P (960×540) high-definition resolution, with a default frame rate of 25FPS and a maximum of 42FPS. The model can quickly create exclusive interactive characters based on a single initial image of a real person, anime character, or cute pet, without complex offline modeling and training. 技术参数方面，Vidu S1 支持 540P（960×540）高清分辨率，默认帧率为 25FPS，最高可达 42FPS。该模型能够基于真人、动漫或萌宠等单张初始图片快速创建专属交互角色，无需进行复杂的离线建模与训练。

Shengshu Technology stated that Vidu S1's real-time interactive features provide the technical foundation for it to enter scenarios such as AI emotional companionship, virtual idols, interactive live streaming, game NPCs, and XR. Currently, Vidu S1 has started internal testing, and users can experience it through the Vidu official website, API platform, or the "Vidu AI Pro" mobile application. 生数科技表示，Vidu S1 的实时交互特性使其具备进入 AI 情感陪伴、虚拟偶像、互动直播、游戏 NPC 及 XR 等场景的技术基础。目前，Vidu S1 已开启内测，用户可通过 Vidu 官网、API 平台或「Vidu AI Pro」移动端应用进行体验。

item.title: 腾讯元宝搜索功能升级，复杂问题可直接看图解
item.guid: 腾讯元宝搜索功能升级，复杂问题可直接看图解
item.description:
Tencent Hunyuan announced yesterday that the search function of its AI intelligent agent, Yuanbao, has undergone a major upgrade, introducing "illustrated explanation" capabilities. This allows for the visualization of complex search results through a combination of images and text, improving information retrieval efficiency. 腾讯混元昨日宣布旗下 AI 智能体元宝的搜索功能完成重大升级，引入「图解」能力，可通过图文搭配的形式，将原本复杂的搜索结果直观化，提升信息获取效率。

    For example, when distinguishing between objects with similar names but completely different fields, such as "Gojo Satoru, Wutiao Ren, and Accusefive," Yuanbao can automatically match image representations of anime characters, independent bands, and pop groups, helping users quickly identify them.

    Regarding the distinction of lipstick shades, Yuanbao can directly display color values such as "rotten tomato red," "maple leaf red," "brick red," and "bean paste color," reducing users' imaginative deviation from text descriptions.

    In terms of travel recommendations, such as searching for Shanghai summer parent-child museums, Yuanbao will provide structured graphic guides based on categories like natural science popularization, technology interaction, and history and culture, accompanied by real venue photos, specimen model images, and reservation tips.

In addition, Yuanbao has enhanced its ability to search for and integrate visual materials. Users can directly search for emoji sticker collections, and Yuanbao will compile and display relevant series of materials. Currently, users can experience the above functions by opening the "Quick Thinking" mode in the Yuanbao chat box. 此外，元宝还强化了视觉素材的搜索与整合能力。用户可以直接搜索表情包合集，元宝将汇总展示相关系列素材。目前，用户可以在元宝对话框中打开「快速思考」模式体验上述功能。

item.title: 茉莉奶白被判赔 LV 1030 万元后更换小程序彩色 Logo
item.guid: 茉莉奶白被判赔-LV-1030-万元后更换小程序彩色-Logo
item.description:
According to a report by Yicai, the Suzhou Intermediate People's Court recently issued a first-instance judgment in the Louis Vuitton Malletier v. Jasmine Milk White trademark infringement case, ruling that Shenzhen Jasmine Milk White Catering Management Co., Ltd. and Wuzhong Economic Development Zone Dongxia Beverage Store infringed upon LV's exclusive right to use 7 registered trademarks featuring four-leaf floral graphics. 据第一财经报道，苏州市中级人民法院近日就路易威登马利蒂诉茉莉奶白商标侵权案作出一审判决，认定深圳市茉莉奶白餐饮管理有限公司及吴中经济开发区东侠饮品店侵害 LV 7 件四叶花卉图形注册商标专用权。

The judgment requires the main company of Jasmine Milk White to compensate LV for economic losses of 10 million yuan and reasonable rights protection expenses of 300,000 yuan, totaling 10.3 million yuan, within 10 days from the effective date of the judgment. 判决要求茉莉奶白主体公司在判决生效之日起 10 日内赔偿 LV 经济损失 1000 万元、维权合理开支 30 万元，合计 1030 万元。

According to Jiemian News, Jasmine Milk White responded that it would appeal according to law and has posted job openings on recruitment websites for positions such as legal manager (intellectual property direction) with a monthly salary of up to 40,000 yuan. 另据界面新闻报道，茉莉奶白回应称将依法上诉，并已在招聘网站挂出月薪最高 4 万元的法务经理（知识产权方向）等岗位。

The Jasmine Milk White mini-program has replaced its original black logo with a colorful one. When asked by a reporter whether the "logo change is related to the LV lawsuit," a customer service representative for Jasmine Milk White responded that the company would appeal according to law and would continue to focus on quality and service in the future. 茉莉奶白小程序已将原本黑色 Logo 更换为彩色 Logo。记者就「换 Logo 是否与 LV 诉讼有关」咨询茉莉奶白客服，工作人员回应称，公司将依法提起上诉，未来继续专注品质与服务。

Despite being embroiled in the lawsuit, Jasmine Milk White saw "exploding orders" at many of its stores yesterday due to a co-branding event, with some stores in Shanghai, Shenzhen, and other places having waiting times of over 1 hour. Data shows that its official Douyin account gained over 110,000 followers in the past two days. 尽管深陷诉讼，茉莉奶白昨日因联名活动带动多地门店「爆单」，上海、深圳等地部分门店排队等待时间超 1 小时。数据显示，其抖音官方账号近两日涨粉超 11 万。

item.title: 小象超市将收包装费：最高 1 元/单，7 月 20 日全国上线
item.guid: 小象超市将收包装费：最高-1-元/单，7-月-20-日全国上线
item.description:
According to Sina Finance, Meituan's Xiaoxiang Supermarket will officially begin charging packaging fees. This policy is scheduled to start a pilot program in Shenzhen on July 6th and will be rolled out nationwide on July 20th. 据新浪财经报道，美团旗下小象超市将正式开始收取包装费。该政策计划于 7 月 6 日在深圳开启试点，并于 7 月 20 日推向全国。

Regarding the charging standards, packaging fees will be charged per order, with only one charge per single order. The packaging fee for regular product orders is 0.5 yuan/order; if the order includes items requiring cold chain preservation, the system will automatically upgrade to cold chain packaging, with the combined fee being 1 yuan/order. Additionally, large items that come with their own packaging, such as milk, rice, flour, and oil, will not be charged a packaging fee. 在收费标准方面，包装费将按订单维度收取，单笔订单仅收一次。常规商品订单的包装费为 0.5 元/单；若订单中包含需要冷链保存的商品，系统将自动升级为冷链包装，费用叠加后为 1 元/单。此外，牛奶、米面油等本身自带包装的大件商品将不收包装费。

Currently, some users have received relevant notifications in the Xiaoxiang Supermarket App. Xiaoxiang Supermarket customer service stated that after charging packaging fees, the quality of packaging bag materials will be upgraded, and the fees collected are only used to cover material and production costs. 目前，已有部分用户在小象超市 App 中收到相关通知。小象超市客服对此表示，收取包装费后，包装袋的材料质量将有所升级，所收费用仅用于覆盖材料和制作成本。

item.title: One Fun Thing｜黄仁勋穿过的 Tom Ford 皮夹克将上拍
item.guid: One-Fun-Thing｜黄仁勋穿过的-Tom-Ford-皮夹克将上拍
item.description:
According to Business Insider, Sotheby's will officially begin bidding on an iconic black leather jacket belonging to Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang starting July 7th. The jacket was designed by Tom Ford and bears Jensen Huang's autograph. 据《商业内幕》报道，苏富比拍卖行将于 7 月 7 日起正式竞拍英伟达 CEO 黄仁勋的一件标志性黑色皮夹克。这件皮夹克由 Tom Ford 设计，并带有黄仁勋本人的亲笔签名。

This leather jacket has appeared multiple times in Jensen Huang's public appearances. Sotheby's estimates that the jacket's selling price will fall between $40,000 and $60,000 (approximately 290,000 to 435,000 RMB). Interestingly, this estimated price is roughly equivalent to the price of a single piece of Nvidia's currently hot Blackwell AI chip. 这件皮夹克曾多次出现在黄仁勋的公开行程中。苏富比拍卖行预计，该夹克的成交价将落在 4 万至 6 万美元（约合人民币 29 万至 43.5 万元）之间。有趣的是，这一预估价格与英伟达目前炙手可热的 Blackwell AI 芯片单片价格大致相当。

This highly recognizable "tech battle robe" will be exhibited at Sotheby's New York until July 16th, with the auction officially closing on July 17th. For super fans who cannot get their hands on a Blackwell chip, this might be another way to own a piece of hardware similar to that of the AI chip giant's CEO. 这件极具辨识度的「科技战袍」将在苏富比纽约展出至 7 月 16 日，拍卖将于 7 月 17 日正式截止。对于那些买不到 Blackwell 芯片的超级粉丝来说，这或许是拥有这位 AI 芯片巨头 CEO 同款硬件的另一种方式。

item.title: 周末看什么｜《诺曼底 72 小时》
item.guid: 周末看什么｜《诺曼底-72-小时》
item.description:
The war-themed film "72 Hours in Normandy" revolves around Colonel James Stagg (played by James Stagg), the chief meteorologist for the Supreme Headquarters Allied Expeditionary Force. 战题材影片《诺曼底72小时》围绕盟军远征军最高司令部首席气象学家詹姆斯·斯塔格上校（詹姆斯·斯塔格 饰）展开。

The film meticulously documents how, within 72 hours before the D-Day landings in June 1944, he utilized the limited meteorological observation methods available at the time, battled uncertainty under extreme psychological pressure, and ultimately convinced Supreme Allied Commander Eisenhower (played by Brendan Fraser) to postpone the original invasion plan. 影片详实记录了他在 1944 年 6 月登陆前 72 小时内，如何利用当时有限的气象观测手段，在极端心理压力下对抗不确定性，并最终说服盟军最高指挥官艾森豪威尔（布兰登·费舍 饰）推迟原定进攻计划的关键过程。

The film departs from the visual logic of grand explosion scenes in traditional war films, focusing its core perspective on the "meteorological gamble" that determined the fate of humanity on the eve of the Normandy landings. 该片一改传统战争片宏大爆破场面的视觉逻辑，将核心视角对准了诺曼底登陆前夕这场关乎人类命运的「气象博弈」。

Douban data shows that nearly 50,000 viewers have given this work a high score of 8.2, with over 80% of ratings being 4 stars or higher. 豆瓣数据显示，已有近 5 万名观众为本作打出 8.2 的高分，其中 4 星及以上评价占比超过 80%。

item.title: 买书不读指南｜《看懂传播》拆解算法时代的媒介逻辑
item.guid: 买书不读指南｜《看懂传播》拆解算法时代的媒介逻辑
item.description:
"Understanding Communication" analyzes the underlying operational logic of media society for general readers, building a systematic media thinking framework through 41 lectures, focusing on five core dimensions: the nature of media, technological power, group behavior, operational mechanisms, and content production. 《看懂传播》面向大众读者解析媒介社会的底层运行逻辑，通过 41 讲内容构建了系统性的媒介思维框架，核心聚焦于五个维度：媒介本质、技术力量、群体行为、操作机制及内容生产。

Liu Hailong analyzes phenomena such as algorithmic recommendations, information cocoons, digital divides, and agenda-setting in the book, explaining how trending topics allocate public attention and how social media leads to "context collapse." 刘海龙在书中剖析了算法推荐、信息茧房、数字鸿沟及议程设置等现象，解释了热搜如何分配公众注意力，以及社交媒体如何导致「语境坍塌」。

The work emphasizes that in the post-truth era, media is not just a carrier of information, but also a measure for reorganizing world order. Through classic theories such as framing theory, the spiral of silence, and the third-person effect, the author guides readers to identify traffic rules and algorithmic pitfalls, thereby maintaining rational judgment in a manipulated information environment. 作品强调，在后真相时代，媒介不仅是信息的载体，更是一种重新组织世界秩序的尺度。作者通过框架理论、沉默的螺旋、第三人效果等经典理论，引导读者识别流量规则与算法误区，从而在被操纵的信息环境中保持理性判断。

item.title: 游戏推荐｜《节奏天国：奇迹之星》
item.guid: 游戏推荐｜《节奏天国：奇迹之星》
item.description:
Nintendo's Planning and Production Division, in collaboration with multiple parties, officially launched "Rhythm Heaven Groove" on Nintendo Switch on July 2, 2026. 任天堂企划制作本部联合多方开发的《节奏天国：奇迹之星》（Rhythm Heaven Groove）于 2026 年 7 月 2 日正式登陆 Nintendo Switch。

This work marks the series' return after 11 years, produced by Tsunku, and features Chinese interface and voice acting for the first time. The game reverts to a flat visual style, includes 100 high-definition remastered levels and 50 new levels, with core gameplay still focusing on minimalist single-button rhythm feedback, and optimized input precision and TV mode synchronization for Switch 2 hardware. 本作是系列时隔 11 年的回归之作，由淳君担纲制作，首次支持中文界面与配音。游戏回归扁平化视觉风格，收录 100 个高清重制关卡及 50 个全新关卡，核心玩法依然聚焦于极简的单键节奏反馈，并针对 Switch 2 硬件优化了输入精度与 TV 模式同步。

The new work introduces a rhythm RPG mode called "Beatspell," where players cast spells and battle using specific rhythmic commands, and also adds cooperative and competitive modes supporting 4-player online play. 新作引入了节奏 RPG 模式「Beatspell」，玩家通过特定节拍指令施法战斗，同时增加了支持 4 人联机的合作与竞争模式。

IGN gave the game a 9 "Amazing" rating, praising its incredibly catchy music, excellent single-player campaign balance, and Remix levels that perfectly combine muscle memory with audiovisual feedback. Although the RPG mode was noted to be a bit monotonous later on, the overall high production quality and social fun make it an unmissable peak sequel in the series. IGN 为本作给出 9 分「Amazing」评价，称其音乐极具洗脑性，单人战役平衡性出色，Remix 关卡完美结合了肌肉记忆与视听反馈。尽管 RPG 模式被指后期稍显单调，但整体凭借极高的制作水准与社交趣味，被视为系列不可错过的巅峰续作。
